anti_claims: This skill JSON seed does not flip source authority away from the current skill markdown projection.
Resolved operated-standard and acted-on-kind edges are structural route mappings, not proof the skill is complete or used correctly by agents.
Absent mechanism or concept neighbours are residual pressure, not evidence that no such neighbours exist.
Generated graph, health, and atlas projections cannot be read back as source evidence.

omitted: mechanism or concept neighbours not named by typed source mapping
omission_receipt.reason: Skill instance preserves public-safe markdown source identity, digest, and typed route mapping only. JSON parity does not prove full skill-body completeness or runtime correctness.

residual_pressure.reentry_condition: Bind skill.uses mechanism and skill.applies concept edges only when source evidence names ids.

justification.summary: This markdown maps principle instance refinement to std_microcosm_principle, the principle doctrine kind, and doctrine fact-claim audit because principle edits must tighten computed support and downstream-governance claim ceilings rather than launder projection claims.

This markdown maps principle instance refinement to std_microcosm_principle, the principle doctrine kind, and doctrine fact-claim audit because principle edits must tighten computed support and downstream-governance claim ceilings rather than launder projection claims.
Skill source mapping names this concept as an applied doctrine boundary.
Skill source mapping names this mechanism as an operational dependency.

skill_payload.mapping_basis: This markdown maps principle instance refinement to std_microcosm_principle, the principle doctrine kind, and doctrine fact-claim audit because principle edits must tighten computed support and downstream-governance claim ceilings rather than launder projection claims.

title: Microcosm Principle Refine Instance
triggers: A governed principle has stale markdown parity, incomplete obligation evidence, unclear witness gaps, or an unsupported governs edge.
The refinement can be scoped from source text, axiom support, or validator evidence without changing the principle standard itself.
workflow: Inspect the principle JSON, PRINCIPLES.md source slice, axiom refs, anti-principle guards, generated health, and relation registry before mutation.
Change only source authority or validator behavior that narrows the claim ceiling or resolves a named relationship from evidence.
Regenerate through the builder and leave unsupported governs or negation bindings as typed residual pressure.
